title: Emails & Activities Filtering Should Be Set to the Widget and Not Across the Accounts

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, the E&A’s saved filters are earmarked as the saved filter ACROSS the entire account on every CRM board. The E&A filter should be saved just to the individual widget.

For example, the filter for the E&A in board A can be configured differently than the filter that is placed on board B.

Even on the item page level, each widget of the E&A should have the capability of having separate filters. For example, item page view Emails can be filtered to only see all emails, whereas item page view Calls can be filtered to only see Calls made from this item.

What are you trying to achieve

Individualized filter tailoring for Emails & Activities widget, but PER widget and not remain static and the same across every widget and board.
